chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 88 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For orders on MA No.31/2024 (R/Surety) 15.02.2024 Mr. Danish Ali Bhatti, Advocate for applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed by applicant Aijaz Ali seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Saddam Hussain, who, on 24.10.2023, was granted protective bail for a period of six days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Special Savings Certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from the letter dated 28.10.2023, issued by the office of learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court-I, Sukkur, annexed with this application. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in some other matters, after waiving notice, has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
